suppliers.name: Elbe Copper GmbH
suppliers.description: Hamburg-based specialist in offshore wind cable systems and medium-voltage copper cables for North Sea projects. Emerging player with strong ESG credentials.

suppliers.name: Vltava Conductors s.r.o.
suppliers.description: Czech manufacturer of stranded copper conductors and bare wire for European panel builders and OEMs. Competitive pricing with ISO 9001 certification.

suppliers.name: Adriatic Cable doo
suppliers.description: Croatian copper cable manufacturer serving Adriatic infrastructure projects. Certified for marine and port environments.

suppliers.name: Silesia Wire SA
suppliers.description: Polish copper wire specialist with large-volume production capacity. Supplies Eastern European automotive and energy sector OEMs.

suppliers.name: Transdanube Kabel Kft
suppliers.description: Hungarian startup producing copper control cables for smart grid and industrial automation. Founded 2019, growing rapidly.

suppliers.name: Éire Copper Systems Ltd
suppliers.description: Irish copper cable manufacturer focused on renewable energy connections and offshore wind onshore infrastructure.

suppliers.name: Kaliningrad Copper OOO
suppliers.description: Russian copper cable producer — subject to EU trade restrictions. Do not source from this entity.

suppliers.name: Aegean Copper SA
suppliers.description: Greek copper cable and conductor manufacturer serving Balkan energy and construction markets.

suppliers.name: Galicia Cable SL
suppliers.description: Spanish medium-voltage copper cable manufacturer with offshore and renewable energy focus. New market entrant 2021.

suppliers.name: Lodz Copper Works SA
suppliers.description: Polish copper wire and conductor producer, recently ISO 9001 certified. Cost-competitive for Eastern European and export markets.
